pages.text: create: industrialized architecture (rip foggy glass pane...)

pages.raw:
why does tfmg add its own concrete
can we rename it so its more obvious that its like "industrial" concrete
no recipe changes

spelunkery polishing is cool

make TFMG cinder blocks easier to craft

(it seems buggy)

REMOVE IE wires except for all redstone logic stuff
+ redstone wires

make redstone wires craftable without aluminum

should we add any of the following
- the trial chamber automation mod
- the enchantment automation mod

should we nerf all non-electric light sources to force infrastructure

can IE lamps be powered with direct connections or do they need wires

add some sort of tutorial in the form of a guidebook with a list of all the cool deco blocks (people will use what the know exists and I dont want to put chisel in this pack)

same thing for redstone/automation/storage

no questlines obv

should any of these take the form of ponders?

yes, ponder for converting electric types
hide the entities from JEI (idk how they even got there)
